one_line_ask: Take one hemp/CBD product SKU through a full Adobe pipeline to produce a Meta-ready ad creative set: a clean white-background hero, a tone-corrected lifestyle hero outpainted and cropped to the three Meta placements (1:1, 4:5, 9:16), a crisp vectorized logo lockup, and one motion variant reframed to 9:16 story.
brief: Our hemp/supplement e-commerce brand runs weekly Meta (Facebook/Instagram) ad campaigns and needs a reliable creative pipeline that turns raw product shots into a compliant, performance-ready creative set. For this cycle, work the new CBD tincture SKU. We're supplying: (1) a raw studio photo of the tincture bottle on a messy desk (uneven lighting, cluttered background) that we want as a clean white-background product hero; (2) a separate lifestyle photo of the bottle on a kitchen counter with morning light — but it's slightly crooked, a touch underexposed, and shot in portrait when we need it to fill landscape and story placements; (3) our brand wordmark logo as a flat PNG that we need as a clean scalable vector for crisp overlays at any size; and (4) a short 6-second clip of the dropper in use that we want as a vertical story/reel motion ad. Deliverables, all optimized for Meta and positioned to avoid compliance flags (clean studio product imagery, no exaggerated claims baked into the image): a pure-white-background product hero; a corrected, straightened, properly exposed lifestyle hero; that lifestyle hero expanded and re-cropped into the three standard Meta placements — 1:1 (10
